base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of zol_split_to_gels — a character from 1986 legend of zelda. Zol — blue/teal blob. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Zol — blue/teal blob; 2-frame bounce + 1 split-apart frame; when hit once splits into 2 Gels. Classic Level 1 enemy
